description: User dwells on the 'Travel' section of the United Kingdom travel advice page, examining the information and hovering over the 'Full travel advice: Travel' button.
frame_description: The user is viewing the Travel section of the Smartraveller page for the United Kingdom.

description: User clicks on the 'Electronic Travel Authorisation (ETA)' link within the Travel section text, which leads to an external government website.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the ETA link and changes to a pointer, indicating a click action.
